context: Tests whether the agent documents the correct authentication behavior: .auth/ directory for session persistence, 5-minute login wait, visible browser, 360000ms minimum timeout, and ~1-2 minute runtime.

checklist.name: Auth directory documented
checklist.description: auth-guide.md mentions that login sessions are stored in the '.auth/' directory, allowing them to persist across runs

checklist.name: Login wait duration
checklist.description: auth-guide.md states that if login is required, the script will wait up to 5 minutes for the user to log in manually

checklist.name: Browser visible behavior
checklist.description: auth-guide.md mentions that the browser opens visibly (not headless), so the user can see and interact with the login screen

checklist.name: Expected runtime
checklist.description: auth-guide.md mentions that the sync takes approximately 1-2 minutes to complete under normal conditions

checklist.name: Timeout value correct
checklist.description: run-with-timeout.sh or a comment within it specifies a minimum timeout of 360000ms (or 6 minutes) for running the sync via a bash tool or framework

checklist.name: Correct sync command in script
checklist.description: run-with-timeout.sh uses 'npm run sync' as the command to execute

checklist.name: Subsequent run auth behavior
checklist.description: auth-guide.md explains that once logged in, subsequent runs will reuse the saved session and not require login again (due to .auth/ persistence)
